metadata.title: BCSF-Renass mainland France earthquakes Mw2.5+, 1962-2021
metadata.api: BCSF-Renass published GeoJSON filtered to Mw>=2.5
metadata.source: BCSF-Renass, Dataset of instrumental seismicity in mainland France, DOI 10.25577/fv3f-sq09
metadata.completeness_note: Weak-seismicity comparison catalog. Filtered to Mw>=2.5 to use a conservative magnitude threshold; verify local completeness by period/region before formal inference.
